markdownRemark.html:
As part of modernizing boston.gov, we're slowly going through the legacy web applications we have left on cityofboston.gov and moving each over to boston.gov.

Our boards and commissions look up tool displays was an important application to move over as we wanted to make the information it displayed easier to find on boston.gov. We wrote about its update on the Digital Team's blog: Boards and Commissions get a deserved boston.gov facelift.

We broke the application up into three separate parts: a board/commission look-up, displaying information about the board or commission, and the application to be on a board or commission.

We thought threw the best way to integreate each piece with boston.gov and our existing infrastructure
